1. Add tests for _prompt_template to dev-loop/tests/test_engine.py (add codex_node and gemini_node to imports too)
2. Add _prompt_template attribute to claude_node, codex_node, gemini_node, shell_node, and template_node in dev-loop/scripts/engine.py

4. Run: uv run pytest dev-loop/tests/test_engine.py -v to verify all tests pass
5. Run: uv run ruff check dev-loop/scripts/engine.py dev-loop/tests/test_engine.py
6. Run: uv run ruff format --check dev-loop/scripts/engine.py dev-loop/tests/test_engine.py
7. Run: uv run pyright
8. Commit with message: 'feat(engine): add _prompt_template attribute to node helpers'
   Include in body: 'Expose the prompt/command template string on claude_node, codex_node,
   gemini_node, shell_node, and template_node. Also add _diagram_label
   to template_node. Enables structural inspection of generated workflows.'
